asset_name: P021 / Peptide 021 Adamantane Conjugate Product Family
status: P1 EVIDENCE CLOSURE WAVE 3 / IDENTITY OR PRODUCT-EQUIVALENCE BLOCK ACTIVE / NOT PLATINUM CERTIFIED
mechanism_summary: Experimental neurotrophic and neurogenic signalling based on a ciliary-neurotrophic-factor-derived peptide fragment with an adamantane-based C-terminal modification.
evidence_maturity: Preclinical mouse evidence across cognitive ageing, Alzheimer-like pathology and Down-syndrome models; adequate human intervention evidence is not established.
regulatory_headline: EXPERIMENTAL PRECLINICAL PRODUCT / EXACT CHEMISTRY AND STEREOCHEMISTRY REQUIRED
certification_blockers: Exact adamantane amino-acid identity and stereochemistry
No established human PK, efficacy or safety
closure_state: PARTIAL IDENTITY CLOSURE — PRIMARY P021 NOTATION, CNTF ORIGIN AND PRECLINICAL PROGRAMME ESTABLISHED; SUPPLIER LINKAGE, PURITY, COMPARABILITY AND HUMAN EVIDENCE OPEN
authoritative_product_boundary: Primary studies describe P021 as Ac-DGGL^AG-NH2, with an adamantylated glycine added to the CNTF-derived DGGL region, and report a molecular weight of approximately 578.3 in the studied material. Evidence consists of experimental cell and animal programmes; it does not establish an authorised medicine or supplier PP10 equivalence.
critical_closure_controls: No transfer to P21 without adamantane
No Alzheimer, Down syndrome, cognition or neurogenesis treatment claim
Patent or animal evidence is not human validation
No dosing, oral, injection or reconstitution protocol
